privateNode.title: Dedicated Node
privateNode.graceHint: Your node is in its grace period. Please renew soon to avoid suspension.
privateNode.suspendedHint: The node is suspended but its IP is retained. It will resume after renewal.
privateNode.provisioningHint: Your node is being provisioned. This usually takes a few minutes, please wait.
privateNode.empty: You don't have any dedicated nodes yet

quotaExhausted.title: Monthly traffic quota used up
quotaExhausted.resetUnknown: Resets at the start of the next cycle

router.title: Add a Router
router.intro: Install k2r on your OpenWrt router, then use the address below to finish connecting.
router.detected: Routers detected on your local network:
router.paste: Copy the address below and paste it into the Settings page of your router panel:

setup.title: Connect your private line
setup.hint: Paste the router connection address generated in the app or on the web below, then tap Connect.
setup.ok: Connecting started. Check the status page in a moment to see your private line.
setup.err: Invalid connection address. Please make sure you copied the full address.
